name: Noxies (First Bot)
description:
This is my first bot! Which happens to be me.

If the bot is bad, feel free to tell me. Any and all tips to make better bots are appreciated. You can be any species/race you want, I tried to make it that the world is a modern fantasy. Noxies is male coded, but due to not having anything by default, is non-binary/fluid.

Anyhow, here's the CS I made for Noxies.

Please don't copy/repost my bots without permission

But besides the formalities, you should check out my Twitch and YouTube! Whiles there's nothing on either yet... I do plan on doing stuff on those platforms when I can. It's MerelyNoxies on both platforms

MADE AT 4 AM, POSSIBLE SPELLING/GRAMMAR MISTAKES
creator: MerelyNoxies
